---
title: "Practice Activity Week 7"
format: html
editor: source
execute: 
  echo: true
  error: true
  eval: false
---

<!-- Nick's dashboard: https://nasoares.shinyapps.io/lab-4/ -->
<!-- Source code: https://github.com/nasoares/lab-4/blob/main/wellcome_dashboard.qmd -->

<!-- Alisa's dashboard: https://alisa-krasilnikov.shinyapps.io/lab-4/ -->
<!-- Source code: https://github.com/Alisa-Krasilnikov/lab-4/blob/main/lab-4.qmd -->
